heading: the K&S Blog
intro: From partners to juniors, we post thoughts and articles from as many perspectives as possible. Explore our blog and see what speaks to you!

posts.title: Designing for a Billion: 5 Ways India's New Building Code is Reimagining the Modern City
posts.author: Paromita Harsha
posts.excerpt: India's urban population is projected to reach 820 million by 2051. A look at how the National Building Code 2016 is rethinking our cities at scale.

posts.title: Architecture That Teaches: The Reality of Designing Modern Educational Spaces
posts.author: Kumar and Swamy Architects
posts.excerpt: Physical space is a silent partner in every classroom. Notes on the real-world challenges and rewards of designing modern educational spaces.

posts.title: Inclusivity in Architecture — Design Without Bias
posts.author: Varun Govind
posts.excerpt: Building spaces that work in a fragmented world. A practical philosophy for bias-free, inclusive design.
